message:
refactor: Convert more stdlib modules to comptime genConst pattern (batch 23)

Converted: aifc, argparse, binascii, bz2, configparser, curses, dbm,
decimal, doctest, email, encodings, enum, ftplib, getopt, getpass, grp,
imaplib, lib2to3, mailbox, mailcap, mmap, modulefinder, nntplib, poplib,
pty, pwd, pyclbr, pydoc, pyexpat, queue, smtplib, sndhdr, socketserver

Total lines: 9,480 (reduced by ~93 lines this batch)
